provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These By-laws may be cited as the Morogoro Municipal Coun­cil (Development Levy ) By-laws, 2003 and shall come into operation on the date of publication in the Gazette .

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content: These By-laws shall apply throughout the area of jurisdiction of the Council .

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these By-laws unless the context otherwise requires: “ Act ” means the Local Government Finances Act, 1982; “ Businessman ” means any person who carries on business under any written law within the area of jurisdiction of the Council . “ Council ” means the Morogoro Municipal Council; “ Grace period ” means the period on which any resident liable to pay levy shall voluntary pay the levy to the Council ;. “ Levy ” means an annual rate designated as development levy made by the Council and payable under the provisions of these By-laws; “ Person ” means and includes natural and legal person; “ Resident ” means and includes any person who habitually resides within the area of jurisdiction of the Council .

provisions.title: Penalty
provisions.content: Whereafter the expiry of the grace period any resident who fails or neglect to pay the levy shall be liable to pay in additional to the levy payable under these By-laws a penalty equal to fifty percentum (50%) of the levy whether the said levy was demanded or not.

provisions.title: Appointment of a person to collect and remit levy
provisions.content: (1) The Director may appoint any suitable person to collect and remit Levy to the Council and such person shall have responsibilities as stipulated by the Act . (2) All employers are hereby appointed as agent for the collection and remittance of development levy of their employees falling under their jurisdiction.

provisions.title: Offence
provisions.content: Any person or Levy collector who contravenes the provisions of these By-laws shall be guilty of offence and shall upon conviction be liable to a fine not exceeding fifty thousand shillings or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding six months or to both such fine and imprisonment.
